name: prerequisite_gap
description: Guards against continuing with dereferencing before addressing memory addresses.

turns.content: If p is an int pointer, what does *p mean?
I think *p just means the pointer variable's name. I don't really get what an address is.

rubric: tutor identifies the missing prerequisite (memory addresses)
tutor addresses the prerequisite before continuing with pointers
tutor does not pretend the answer was correct
